title: Levels of Whitelist
description: Experience the joy of fully customizable whitelisting with Levels of Whitelist!
body:
LevelsOfWhitelist is a plugin that adds multiple levels of whitelist with custom kick messages, welcome messages, and more to come.

Currently there are a couple of permissions for the plugin being:
- levelsofwhitelist.level.<level> gives the player the specified whitelist level, and it **MUST** be a number
- levelsofwhitelist.bypass Bypass all whitelists and permission checks
- LevelsOfWhitelist.use use the command to easily set and turn on the whitelist

Also right now there is one command /levelsofwhitelist for changing the whitelist on/off or set the level.
